title: fix: show 3d model prices and icons
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Fixes 3D catalog conversion so Trellis/Rodin render flat output `/gen` price badges.
- Adds a shared cube icon for 3D price badges.
- Adds model-row brand logo SVG assets and mappings for Microsoft and Deemos.
- Extends pricing-data coverage to include 3D prices and brand-logo URL mappings.

Root cause: the dashboard mapped 3D pricing into legacy unused fields instead of the rendered `prices[]` rows, and the 3D model brands were missing from the existing `/brand-logos/*.svg` mapping.

Checks:
- `npm run test -- test/pricing-data.test.ts`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `biome check --write <touched files>`
- `test -f enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/public/brand-logos/microsoft.svg && test -f enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/public/brand-logos/deemos.svg`
- `git diff --check`

gist.headline: Putting a price on the Z-axis
gist.blurb: We fixed a sneaky bug that was hiding the price tags and brand logos for our 3D models. Now Trellis and Rodin proudly display their costs and creator badges in the catalog.
gist.summary: Fixed a dashboard bug that prevented 3D model prices and brand logos for Microsoft and Deemos from rendering in the model catalog.
gist.impact: Users can now see accurate price badges and creator icons for 3D models like Trellis and Rodin directly in the UI.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a shopkeeper, putting price tags on glowing 3D cubes. The monitor robot is checking a catalog or inventory list. Represents fixing the display of prices and icons for 3D models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny shop apron, sticking small price tags onto glowing 3D cubes. A chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a clipboard with a catalog list. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
